expo.name: HexAstral
expo.description: AI-powered East Asian metaphysical reading — Zi Wei, Ba Zi, I Ching, and Physiognomy

infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: HexAstral uses motion sensors to detect how you shake your phone to generate authentic hexagram readings.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: HexAstral uses your location to look up your birth city and timezone for accurate chart calculations.
infoPlist.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: HexAstral uses anonymous analytics to improve your reading experience and app quality.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: HexAstral uses the camera to capture face or hand photos for physiognomy readings.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: HexAstral accesses your photo library to select face or hand photos for physiognomy readings.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: HexAstral saves your reading cards and charts to your photo library for easy sharing.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: HexAstral accesses your contacts to find friends who are already on HexAstral and to invite others.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: HexAstral reads your health data — such as sleep, heart rate, and activity — to enrich your metaphysical readings with real physiological context.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: HexAstral may write reading milestones and mindfulness session records to your Health app.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: HexAstral can add auspicious dates and personal almanac events to your calendar.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: HexAstral needs full calendar access to add auspicious dates and personal almanac events to your calendar.
infoPlist.NSRemindersFullAccessUsageDescription: HexAstral needs access to reminders to help you track important practices.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: HexAstral uses Face ID to protect your personal readings and health data.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: HexAstral uses the microphone for voice-activated readings and Siri shortcuts.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: HexAstral uses speech recognition to let you ask questions and request readings by voice.
